# Call Dr. Gene Boyle — Irvine to Las Vegas Relocation (full corpus)

> Real estate relocation service for people moving from Irvine, California to Las Vegas, Nevada.
> Dr. Gene Boyle (California DRE Salesperson #02282581, 320 Junco, Irvine, CA 92618) plans the move from Irvine.
> Dr. Jan Duffy (Nevada REALTOR® #S.0197614, Berkshire Hathaway HomeServices Nevada Properties) handles Las Vegas property tours, contracts, and closing.

---

## Home — https://www.calldrboyle.com/

Dr. Gene Boyle helps people move to Las Vegas from Irvine, California. He plans your relocation or second-home purchase from Irvine and coordinates with Dr. Jan Duffy in Las Vegas for property tours, contracts, and closing support.

Service areas include Las Vegas, Henderson, Summerlin, and the Las Vegas Valley. California origin: Irvine and Orange County.

Contact: Hello@CallDrBoyle.com, Gene@CallDrBoyle.com, Relocation@CallDrBoyle.com

---

## Relocation — https://www.calldrboyle.com/relocation

Relocation overview for Irvine-area residents moving to Las Vegas. Dr. Gene Boyle in Irvine handles planning, timeline, and California-side coordination. Dr. Jan Duffy in Las Vegas provides tours, offers, and Nevada contract support through Berkshire Hathaway HomeServices Nevada Properties.

Popular destination areas include Summerlin, Henderson, Green Valley, Skye Canyon, Southern Highlands, and Inspirada. Property types range from resale homes to new construction and 55+ active-adult communities.

---

## How it works — https://www.calldrboyle.com/how-it-works

Step-by-step Irvine to Las Vegas relocation process:

1. Plan in Irvine — Dr. Gene Boyle learns your move goals, second-home plans, and timing from 320 Junco, Irvine, CA 92618.
2. Match Las Vegas options — Narrow neighborhoods, price ranges, and property types before traveling to Nevada.
3. Tour and offer in Las Vegas — Dr. Jan Duffy leads showings, offers, and local contract coordination.
4. Close in Nevada — Dr. Jan Duffy supports inspections, appraisal, and closing while Dr. Boyle remains your California point of contact.

---

## Irvine to Las Vegas — https://www.calldrboyle.com/irvine-to-las-vegas

Dedicated landing page for moving from Irvine, California to Las Vegas. Covers why Californians relocate (housing costs, tax structure, lifestyle), how the dual-agent model works, and how to schedule a relocation call.

---

## Moving guide — https://www.calldrboyle.com/guides/moving-from-irvine-to-las-vegas

Detailed guide for Irvine to Las Vegas moves: planning timeline, choosing neighborhoods, financing considerations, and coordinating California departure with Nevada purchase.

Dr. Jan Duffy — Nevada REALTOR® License #S.0197614. Berkshire Hathaway HomeServices Nevada Properties. Las Vegas tours, contracts, and closing support.

---

## About — https://www.calldrboyle.com/about

Dr. Gene Boyle is the California relocation contact for Irvine to Las Vegas moves. Dr. Jan Duffy is the Nevada licensed agent who executes the Las Vegas transaction through Berkshire Hathaway HomeServices Nevada Properties.
